invariant_descriptions.CURIOSITY-0: invert_fitness() MUST return 1.0-base_fitness when active; base_fitness in [0.0,1.0] enforced.
invariant_descriptions.CURIOSITY-STOP-0: tick() MUST exit immediately on health<0.50 or protected file match.
invariant_descriptions.CURIOSITY-AUDIT-0: All transitions append to discoveries and persist to disk.

notes: Innovation #29 — Curiosity-Driven Exploration. curiosity_guard() enforces constitutional bounds at governance gate.
